tests.text: You should have { category: "woodwinds", instrument: "Clarinet", price: 200 } inside your instrumentsArr.
You should have { category: "woodwinds", instrument: "Oboe", price: 4000 } inside your instrumentsArr.

description: Dodajte još dva objekta u vaš instrumentsArr da predstavljaju preostale drvenaste instrumente, klarinet i oboju.
